meta.purpose: Small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, and same-event current rows stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.

primarySourcesChecked: data/database.json roster skeleton on main for Lot 71-75
HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press D/E result PDF locator from prior batch logs
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting result PDF
Web exact-name searches scoped to HPA/high-trust result terms
batchScope.openPrCheck: No open Numata athlete research PRs were found before this batch. This continues after Lot 66-70.
batchScope.writeScope: Research log only. No app runtime, CSS, print template, A4 layout, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json changes.
